memory_target: toy cyclic memory contract for alias visibility
memory_authority_scope: diagnostic structural guardrail only; does not widen source authority or adequacy
winding_policy: record wrap count or provenance when slots are reused
state_carry_boundary: fixture records finite slot bookkeeping only
freshness_window: fixture only; no KV cache tested
stale_read_policy: stale reads fail closed or enter residual escrow
coverage_claim: structural coverage is not semantic coverage
loop_exit_condition: stop after declared budget or route to residual
authority_non_widening: mapped slots inherit the original context authority, lease, permitted use, and adequacy boundary
residuals: no KV-cache certifier or learned-memory workload has been run
